attributes.gen_ai.operation.name: invoke_agent
plan_execute.plan.preview: Identify the time period of the Russian Civil War, which lasted from 1917 to 1922.
Determine the key events leading to the defeat of Alexander Kerensky and the Provisional Government by the Bolsheviks.
Research the date when the Russian Civil War effectively ended with the Bolshevik victory.
